title: DSIT evaluation strategy
body: "This strategy outlines the Department for Science, Innovation and Technology’s (DSIT) vision to make evaluation integral to our policy development and decision-making.  To achieve this vision, there are 3 core objectives:   effective evaluation governance robust and innovative methodologies improved evaluation dissemination and use   This is DSIT’s first evaluation strategy. It outlines an ambitious plan for delivering a demonstrable change in how DSIT plans, implements, and learns from evaluation activity.  "
